decks.notes: The deck focuses on aggressive strategies combined with blinking effects to create value and disrupt opponents. It utilizes cards like Ephemerate and Consign to Memory to repeatedly trigger enter the battlefield effects of creatures like Guide of Souls and Starfield Shepherd. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption while Witch Enchanter and Ocelot Pride provide additional aggression. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly while controlling the tempo of the game through blinking and removal spells like Solitude and Subtlety.

The focus of this deck is to quickly build up a strong board presence with cheap artifacts and pump effects, utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble, Mox Opal, and Engineered Explosives. By quickly playing out artifacts and using synergistic cards like Arcbound Ravager and Pinnacle Emissary, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with early aggression. Cards like Weapons Manufacturing and Shadowspear help to further boost the power of the deck's creatures, while Urza's Saga provides additional value and consistency. Emry, Lurker of the Loch also helps to recur artifacts from the graveyard, maintaining pressure on the opponent.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to generate quick creature threats and control the board with removal spells and enchantments. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures like White Orchid Phantom and Guide of Souls, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Skyclave Apparition and Ranger-Captain of Eos. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Ephemerate and Eternal Witness for card advantage and recursion. By combining aggressive threats with disruptive elements, the deck aims to establish board presence and close out the game quickly.

The primary focus of this deck is to mill the opponent's deck as quickly as possible using cards like Hedron Crab, Ruin Crab, and Fractured Sanity. By filling up the opponent's graveyard, cards like Archive Trap and Tasha's Hideous Laughter become devastatingly powerful. Surgical Extraction can also be used to remove key cards from the opponent's graveyard. The deck also includes some control elements like Drown in the Loch and Fatal Push to deal with threats, while Visions of Beyond helps to cycle through the deck quickly. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's strategy by milling their key cards away.

This deck focuses on utilizing Leyline Binding and Leyline of the Guildpact to control the opponent's board while aggressively attacking with Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, Scion of Draco, and Territorial Kavu. Quantum Riddler and Psychic Frog provide additional control options, while Subtlety can disrupt the opponent's strategy. Teferi, Time Raveler offers versatility and disruption. The mana base includes various fetchlands and triomes to ensure consistency in casting spells. Lightning Bolt provides additional removal and reach. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly while maintaining control of the game.

The main concept of this combo landless deck is to use mana ramp, card draw, counter spells, and tutors to assemble the Goblin Charbelcher combo. By generating a large amount of mana and using Whir of Invention to search for Goblin Charbelcher, the player can deal massive damage to the opponent in one shot. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Disrupting Shoal and Force of Negation to protect the combo and control the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble the combo and win the game before the opponent can react effectively.

The deck focuses on utilizing mill cards like Ruin Crab, Fractured Sanity, and Tasha's Hideous Laughter to rapidly deplete the opponent's library. It also includes control elements like Drown in the Loch and Fatal Push to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Archive Trap and Surgical Extraction are used to further accelerate the milling process, while cards like Preordain and Visions of Beyond provide card draw to maintain momentum. The mana base includes fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent mana production. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent by milling them out quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively play small creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Slickshot Show-Off while using spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart for direct damage and removal. The deck also utilizes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Preordain for card advantage and to set up powerful plays. The goal is to quickly apply pressure to the opponent and overwhelm them with a combination of creature damage and burn spells. The inclusion of cards like Mutagenic Growth and Dragon's Rage Channeler helps to pump up the creatures and maintain a fast clock.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Monastery Swiftspear, while utilizing cheap burn spells such as Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to deal damage to the opponent and clear blockers. The deck aims to control the board and pressure the opponent with quick and efficient threats, while also using cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration to maintain card advantage and improve draws. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault, finishing the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This aggressive red deck aims to burn down opponents quickly with direct damage spells and efficient creatures. The key strategy is to maintain a low curve and consistently apply pressure to the opponent's life total. Use cheap spells and creatures to deal damage quickly and efficiently, while also maintaining card advantage with cards like Light Up the Stage and Mishra's Bauble. This deck is designed to win games within the first few turns by overwhelming the opponent with fast and relentless aggression.

This UR Control deck focuses on disrupting opponents with counterspells, removal, and card advantage, while also utilizing powerful planeswalkers like Teferi and versatile creatures like Snapcaster Mage. The deck aims to control the game through tempo swings and card advantage, eventually overwhelming the opponent with efficient threats and powerful spells. Mishra's Bauble provides additional card selection and synergy with cards like Thundering Falls, while key cards like Flame of Anor and Thundertrap Trainer help maintain board control and pressure the opponent. Overall, this deck excels at outmaneuvering opponents and grinding out wins through careful play and resource management.

The deck focuses on fast-paced aggression by utilizing cascade spells to put pressure on the opponent quickly. By cascading into powerful spells like Violent Outburst and Surging Footfalls, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures. It also includes disruptive elements like Force of Negation and Subtlety to control the game and protect its threats. The deck's mana base is designed to support its cascade strategy while also providing flexibility for casting its spells effectively. Overall, the deck aims to be proactive and disruptive, aiming to win the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures such as Griselbrand and Ulamog, the Defiler, and then using cards like Psychic Frog and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to bring them back onto the battlefield instantly. Using a combination of reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and control cards like Force of Negation, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with unexpected threats and disrupt their game plan. With the ability to quickly assemble powerful combos and control the game, this deck is designed to be a fast and versatile threat in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on assembling powerful combinations of creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, and Emrakul, the Promised End, along with support from Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and generate massive advantage. With cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble for control, the goal is to establish a dominant board presence and close out the game quickly. The inclusion of cards like Vexing Bauble and Blade of the Bloodchief provide additional utility and synergy in this aggressive combo-focused deck.

The key concept of this Jeskai Control deck is to utilize a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage to control the game and outvalue the opponent. By using cards like Counterspell, Wrath of the Skies, and Teferi, Time Raveler, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while drawing cards with Consult the Star Charts and Snapcaster Mage to maintain a steady stream of resources. Additionally, the deck includes versatile threats like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria to generate card advantage and close out the game.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts to the battlefield in order to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. The main strategy involves using cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to generate mana, while also benefiting from cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager to maximize the efficiency of artifacts on the field. Additionally, cards like Pinnacle Emissary and Weapons Manufacturing provide additional support for the artifact theme, while cards like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt offer disruption and protection against opposing strategies.
